entries.detail:
Files created:
  architecture/schema.md — Database Schema
  architecture/video-processing.md — Video Processing Pipeline
  architecture/api-contracts.md — API Specs
  architecture/tech-stack.md — Next.js + NestJS + AWS S3/MediaConvert
  architecture/components.md — Component Diagram
  architecture/data-flow.md — Sequence Diagram
  architecture/adr-001.md — Video Upload Strategy
  architecture/adr-002.md — DB Selection
Why: Offloads massive file ingestion and CPU-heavy FFmpeg transcoding from backend API to managed AWS services (S3 and MediaConvert), ensuring API stability and automated scaling.
Why: PostgreSQL provides strong relational capabilities for users, videos, comments, and subscriptions. Redis handles high-frequency counters (views) and rate limiting.
